subcodes.first_line: Say: Divine Unity consisteth in the recognition of that Sacred Self Who is sanctified above all who are in the world and exalted above the conditions of all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل التوحید هو عرفان نفسی مقدسه عن کل من فی العالم و منزهه عن شئونات العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
